recommendations.title: Buster's Mal Heart
recommendations.overview: An eccentric mountain man on the run from the local sheriff recalls the mysterious events that brought him to his present fugitive state.

recommendations.title: Center Stage
recommendations.overview: A group of 12 teenagers from various backgrounds enroll at the American Ballet Academy in New York to make it as ballet dancers and each one deals with the problems and stress of training and getting ahead in the world of dance.

recommendations.title: StreetDance 3D
recommendations.overview: In order to win the Street Dance Championships, a dance crew is forced to work with ballet dancers from the Royal Dance School in exchange for rehearsal space.

recommendations.title: Suspiria
recommendations.overview: An American newcomer to a prestigious German ballet academy comes to realize that the school is a front for something sinister amid a series of grisly murders.

recommendations.title: Into the Beat
recommendations.overview: Katya is a young, outstanding and upcoming ballet dancer. In just a few weeks she is due to have a major audition for the New York Ballet Academy and Katya has good chances of getting a scholarship. But when she meets a group of street-dancers the gi

recommendations.title: Holidays
recommendations.overview: An anthology feature film that puts a uniquely dark and original spin on some of the most iconic and beloved holidays of all time by challenging our folklore, traditions and assumptions.
recommendations.director: Gary Shore, Adam Egypt Mortimer, Nicholas McCarthy, Kevin Smith, Kevin Kölsch, Scott Stewart, Anthony Scott Burns, Dennis Widmyer, Sarah Adina Smith

recommendations.title: Stomp the Yard

recommendations.title: Feel the Beat
recommendations.overview: After failing to make it on Broadway, April returns to her hometown and reluctantly begins training a misfit group of young dancers for a competition.

recommendations.title: Back of the Net
recommendations.overview: A new student at a soccer academy is determined to beat her rival's team in the national tournament.

recommendations.title: Godless Youth
recommendations.overview: German students compete to enter one of the country's elite schools.
